title: Termite Treatment in Edison, NJ | $800-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment services in Edison, NJ starting at $800. Expert termite extermination and prevention for homes and businesses. Licensed and insured. Call today!
intro: Edison, New Jersey homeowners and business owners face ongoing challenges with termite infestations that can cause thousands in structural damage if left untreated. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive termite treatment services throughout Edison, from Menlo Park to Clara Barton, with proven solutions starting at $800. Our licensed technicians use advanced detection methods and treatment options to protect your property investment.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of termite control expertise to Edison properties, using eco-friendly treatment methods and state-of-the-art technology. We offer free inspections, transparent pricing, same-day emergency service, and a satisfaction guarantee that gives Edison residents peace of mind.
localContext: Edison's mix of older colonial homes near Roosevelt Park and newer developments around Raritan Center creates diverse termite challenges requiring customized solutions. The township's humid climate and proximity to wooded areas like Dismal Swamp Conservation Area make year-round termite monitoring essential for property protection.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Edison typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the severity of infestation, property size, and treatment method required. Smaller homes with localized infestations may cost around $800-$1,500, while larger properties or extensive damage can reach $3,000-$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: What termite treatment methods do you use in Edison?
faqs.answer: We offer multiple termite treatment options including liquid termiticide barrier treatments, bait station systems, and localized spot treatments. For Edison properties, we often recommend Termidor liquid treatments for comprehensive protection or Sentricon bait systems for ongoing monitoring. Our technicians will assess your specific situation and recommend the most effective solution.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take to work in Edison homes?
faqs.answer: Most liquid termiticide treatments begin working immediately, with full colony elimination typically occurring within 90 days. Bait systems may take 3-6 months for complete colony eradication but provide long-term monitoring benefits. We schedule follow-up inspections to ensure treatment effectiveness and provide warranty coverage for your Edison property.

faqs.question: Are termites common in Edison, New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Yes, Edison is located in a high-risk termite zone with significant subterranean termite activity year-round. The township's climate, older housing stock, and wooded areas create ideal conditions for termite colonies. Regular inspections are recommended, especially for homes near Roosevelt Park, Dismal Swamp, or properties with wood-to-ground contact.
